sentences.target: Ich habe eine Infektion am Fuß.

translations.de: Ich habe eine Infektion am Fuß.
translations.en: I have an infection on my foot.
translations.es: Tengo una infección en el pie.
translations.vi: Tôi bị nhiễm trùng ở bàn chân.
translations.nl: Ik heb een infectie aan mijn voet.
translations.nb: Jeg har en infeksjon i foten.
translations.sv: Jag har en infektion i foten.
translations.da: Jeg har en infektion i foden.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1sg; lexical 'haben' meaning possession, governing the direct object.
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner for 'Infektion'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'habe'.
Preposition (contraction of 'an dem') selecting dative; introduces the PP 'am Fuß' expressing location.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'an' in the PP 'am Fuß'.

sentences.target: Der Arzt verschreibt etwas gegen die Infektion.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ aːʁt͡st fɛɐ̯ˈʃʁaɪ̯pt ˈɛtvas ˈɡeːɡn̩ diː ɪnfɛkˈt͡si̯oːn/

translations.de: Der Arzt verschreibt etwas gegen die Infektion.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ aːʁt͡st fɛɐ̯ˈʃʁaɪ̯pt ˈɛtvas ˈɡeːɡn̩ diː ɪnfɛkˈt͡si̯oːn/
translations.en: The doctor is prescribing something for the infection.
translations.es: El médico receta algo para la infección.
translations.fr: Le médecin prescrit quelque chose contre l'infection.
translations.it: Il medico prescrive qualcosa contro l'infezione.
translations.pt: O médico receita algo para a infecção.
translations.tr: Doktor enfeksiyon için bir ilaç yazıyor.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ đang kê thuốc để trị nhiễm trùng.
translations.nl: De dokter schrijft iets voor tegen de infectie.
translations.hu: Az orvos gyógyszert ír fel a fertőzésre.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर संक्रमण के लिए दवा लिख रहे हैं।
translations.el: Ο γιατρός συνταγογραφεί κάτι για τη μόλυνση.
translations.nb: Legen skriver ut noe mot infeksjonen.
translations.id: Dokter meresepkan obat untuk infeksi itu.
translations.sv: Läkaren skriver ut något mot infektionen.
translations.ja: 医者が感染症に効く薬を処方しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner for 'Arzt'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a direct object ('etwas') and a PP ('gegen die Infektion').
Indefinite pronoun, accusative; direct object of 'verschreibt'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces a PP expressing opposition or intended target ('die Infektion').
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner for 'Infektion' within the PP.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'gegen'.

sentences.target: Ich fürchte eine Infektion nach dem Piercing.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʏʁçtə ˈaɪ̯nə ɪnfɛkˈt͡si̯oːn naːx deːm ˈpiːɐ̯sɪŋ/

translations.de: Ich fürchte eine Infektion nach dem Piercing.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʏʁçtə ˈaɪ̯nə ɪnfɛkˈt͡si̯oːn naːx deːm ˈpiːɐ̯sɪŋ/
translations.en: I'm afraid of an infection after the piercing.
translations.es: Me preocupa una infección después del piercing.
translations.fr: J'ai peur d'une infection après le piercing.
translations.it: Ho paura di un'infezione dopo il piercing.
translations.yue: 我擔心打完耳洞之後會感染。
translations.pt: Tenho medo de pegar uma infecção depois do piercing.
translations.vi: Tôi sợ bị nhiễm trùng sau khi xỏ khuyên.
translations.ar: أخاف من حدوث عدوى بعد الثقب.
translations.nl: Ik ben bang voor een infectie na de piercing.
translations.hu: Félek, hogy a piercing után fertőzést kapok.
translations.hi: मुझे पियर्सिंग के बाद संक्रमण होने का डर है।
translations.el: Φοβάμαι μήπως πάθω μόλυνση μετά το πίρσινγκ.
translations.nb: Jeg er redd for infeksjon etter piercingen.
translations.id: Saya takut kena infeksi setelah tindik.
translations.sv: Jag är rädd för infektion efter piercingen.
translations.ro: Mi-e teamă de o infecție după piercing.
translations.da: Jeg er bange for infektion efter piercingen.
translations.ja: ピアスを開けत後に感染するのが心配です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1sg; governs the direct object and an adjunct PP.
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner for 'Infektion'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'fürchte'.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner for 'Piercing' in the PP.
Neuter noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Wir vermeiden eine Infektion durch häufiges Händewaschen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈmaɪ̯dən ˈaɪ̯nə ɪnfɛkˈt͡si̯oːn dʊʁç ˈhɔʏfɪɡəs ˈhɛndəvaʃn̩/

translations.de: Wir vermeiden eine Infektion durch häufiges Händewaschen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈmaɪ̯dən ˈaɪ̯nə ɪnfɛkˈt͡si̯oːn dʊʁç ˈhɔʏfɪɡəs ˈhɛndəvaʃn̩/
translations.en: We avoid infection by washing our hands often.
translations.es: Evitamos infecciones lavándonos las manos con frecuencia.
translations.fr: Nous évitons les infections en nous lavant souvent les mains.
translations.it: Evitiamo le infezioni lavandoci spesso le mani.
translations.ko: 우리는 손을 자주 씻어서 감염을 예방해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们经常洗手来预防感染。
translations.yue: 我哋經常洗手嚟預防感染。
translations.ru: Мы предотвращаем инфекции, часто моем руки.
translations.pt: Evitamos infecções lavando as mãos com frequência.
translations.he: אנחנו נמנעים מזיהומים על ידי שטיפת ידיים לעיתים קרובות.
translations.tr: Elleri sık sık yıkayarak enfeksiyondan kaçınıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tránh nhiễm trùng bằng cách rửa tay thường xuyên.
translations.nl: We voorkomen infecties door vaak onze handen te wassen.
translations.uk: Ми уникаємо інфекцій, часто миючи руки.
translations.hi: हम अक्सर हाथ धोकर संक्रमण से बचते हैं।
translations.el: Αποφεύγουμε τις λοιμώξεις πλένοντας συχνά τα χέρια μας.
translations.nb: Vi unngår infeksjoner ved va vaske hendene ofte.
translations.id: Kami mencegah infeksi dengan sering mencuci tangan.
translations.sv: Vi undviker infektioner genom att tvätta händerna ofta.
translations.ro: Evităm infecțiile spălându-ne des pe mâini.
translations.cs: Vyhýbáme se infekcím častým mytím rukou.
translations.da: Vi undgår infektioner ved at vaske hænder ofte.
translations.ja: 手をよく洗うことで感染を防ぎます。

El médico receta algo para la infección.
